creator: ch.parvanov@gmail.com
text:
Hello , 

I have server with Supermicro X11-SSL-F with latest BIOS motherboard and tried to install FreeBSD 11.0-Stable from CD , the machine and the usb keyboard freeze when the beastie logo shows just before boot. After 2-3 restarts it managed to boot and install without a problem. After the restart and boot from HDD , the problem appears again, i have to restart the machine 2-3 times and it boot normal, until next reboot. 

This is happens again on flash drive with BSDRP 10.3 image . I managed to fix this when disable the beastie logo to show from loader.conf on both HDD (11.0) and flash drive (10.3) 

beastie_disable="YES"

After that BSDRP 10.3 and BSD 11.0 boot without any problems. 

I tried everything from BIOS , but i dont think its a BIOS issue. 

I think its something with USB initializations on boot or something else. 

Cheers
